title: schulzia crinita subsp. albiflora
intro: Schulzia crinita subsp. albiflora, also known as White Hair Balsam, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae, characterized by its white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Schulzia crinita subsp. albiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Schulzia crinita subsp. albiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, and its roots are also used in traditional medicine.
